name: Pactum AI Autonomous Negotiation Platform API
what_it_does: Autonomous AI negotiation platform with REST API — enabling procurement and commercial teams to deploy AI agents that conduct actual supplier negotiations autonomously via email and chat, optimizing payment terms, pricing, and contract conditions using preference-based value optimization, with human oversight and escalation controls.
use_cases: Deploying Pactum AI agents for autonomous supplier negotiation via API integration with procurement workflow
Integrating Pactum negotiation outcomes with P2P platforms (SAP Ariba, Coupa) via API
Querying negotiation results, savings achieved, and supplier response rates via Pactum API
Configuring negotiation parameters, acceptable ranges, and escalation rules via Pactum API
Triggering Pactum negotiation campaigns for tail spend suppliers via API at scale
not_for: Strategic supplier relationships requiring human relationship management
Complex multi-variable RFx with technical evaluation (use Keelvar for complex optimization)
Consumer purchasing (Pactum is enterprise B2B commercial negotiation only)
best_when: A large enterprise procurement team needs to negotiate with hundreds or thousands of tail spend suppliers simultaneously — where manual negotiation is economically impossible but leaving terms as-is represents significant value leakage.
avoid_when: You have strategic supplier relationships requiring human touch, low supplier count, or need full visibility into negotiation tactics for audit and compliance.

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials flow for system integrations. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped with negotiation campaign access controls. Webhook for negotiation lifecycle events (campaign started, negotiation completed, agreement reached). REST API for negotiation campaign management. Integration with SAP Ariba, Coupa, and Oracle. SAML SSO for enterprise identity. AI negotiation engine uses preference elicitation and optimization theory.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; enterprise pricing only
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing; typically performance-based (share of savings); contact sales
pricing.notes: Estonian company (Tallinn). Founded 2019. Raised $55M Series A (2022). Backed by Atomico, Salesforce Ventures, Accel. Unique positioning: AI agents that actually conduct negotiations, not just recommendations. Used by Walmart (pilot), McDonald's, Wesco International. Published research in autonomous negotiation theory. Preference optimization theory from game theory foundations. Performance-based pricing model (share of savings achieved) aligns incentives. Strong academic foundation from Estonian tech community.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for negotiation campaign management. OAuth2 client credentials auth. Enterprise documentation with SAP Ariba/Coupa integration guides. Webhook for negotiation lifecycle events. AI negotiation engine configuration requires procurement expertise. Autonomous negotiation has legal and compliance implications — careful audit trail required. Estonian company with GDPR-first design.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Negotiation campaign reads fully idempotent. Outcome reads idempotent by campaign ID. Campaign creation requires external ID for idempotency.
known_agent_gotchas: Autonomous AI negotiation has legal implications — ensure supplier consent and contractual authority
Negotiation parameters (acceptable ranges) must be carefully configured — misconfiguration costs money
Performance-based pricing (share of savings) — verify measurement methodology before signing
Audit trail for AI negotiation decisions required for procurement compliance
Integration with SAP Ariba/Coupa required before AI negotiation can operate on real supplier data

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR compliant. EU and US data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. Estonian company with GDPR-first design. Autonomous negotiation data is highly sensitive — commercial terms, pricing, and strategy must be strictly protected. Negotiation outcomes are binding commercial agreements — access controls are critical. Atomico and Salesforce Ventures backing implies enterprise security standards. AI negotiation audit trails required for procurement compliance.
